title: Commercial Law – Legal Services for Businesses
description: We specialise in comprehensive legal services for companies and entrepreneurs: company formation, commercial contracts, M&A, restructuring, B2B debt recovery. Specter & Associates Law Firm, Warsaw.
content:
Legal Services for Businesses – Why Are They Essential?

Running a business requires compliance with a wide range of legal rules and regulations. Poorly drafted contracts, corporate governance failures or ignorance of legal obligations can result in lost contracts, liability for damages or even insolvency. Specter & Associates Law Firm in Warsaw provides comprehensive legal services for entrepreneurs – from sole traders to large corporations.

Scope of Our Commercial Law Services

Our team of commercial law specialists supports businesses at every stage of their operation:

  • Company formation and registration – limited liability companies, joint-stock companies, partnerships, foreign branches and representative offices. We guide you through the entire registration process with the National Court Register (KRS), advise on the optimal legal and tax structure.
  • Commercial contracts – drafting and reviewing B2B agreements, domestic and international contracts, general terms and conditions, distribution agreements, franchise and licensing agreements, supply and cooperation contracts.
  • Mergers and acquisitions (M&A) – legal due diligence, share and asset purchase transactions, company transformations, demergers and mergers. We protect the legal security of transactions from the negotiation stage through to closing.
  • Restructuring and insolvency – advice on debt restructuring, restructuring proceedings (accelerated arrangement proceedings, remedial proceedings), representation in insolvency proceedings.
  • Corporate law – general meetings and board meetings support, drafting resolutions, internal regulations, shareholder agreements, protection of minority shareholder rights.

Ongoing Legal Retainer Services

We offer businesses ongoing legal services on a retainer basis. Under a retainer agreement, the company has a dedicated lawyer who:

  • provides day-to-day legal advice on business operations,
  • reviews contracts and documents before signing,
  • represents the company in negotiations with counterparties,
  • monitors legislative changes affecting the business,
  • conducts court and administrative proceedings on the company's behalf.

Ongoing legal services are particularly beneficial for businesses that regularly enter into contracts, employ staff or operate in heavily regulated sectors.

B2B Debt Recovery – Recovering Amounts Owed by Businesses

Unpaid invoices are a major pain point for many entrepreneurs. Specter & Associates offers effective recovery of trade receivables:

  • Pre-litigation recovery – formal demand letters, negotiation of repayment terms, out-of-court settlements,
  • Payment order proceedings – obtaining a payment order in the shortest possible time,
  • Enforcement proceedings – serving the enforcement title on the bailiff and monitoring the proceedings,
  • European Payment Order – recovering debts from counterparties in other EU member states.

We act quickly and effectively. Most debt recovery matters are resolved at the pre-litigation stage, minimising costs and time.
